Singer:Vishal Dadlani

Va va va
va va va va vettaiyaada
Po po po
po po po po nottampoda
Thaga thag thak
Thaga thag thak thak thaagathoda
Thiru thithikithu
thiru thiru thicku thirupaathoda

Yettaadha uyaramenna
Ulagathil engeyum
onnumilla
Ezhundhu vaa
Thappu nu therinjukitta
Thunichalaa
Sattunu nee adi daa

Pathoda panthinonna
Nee illai
Gethaaga kelambidu daa
Purapadu
machi nee kaiya vaachu
Polandhidu
Adi adi marana adi

Veriyodu nee ponaal
Un vegam innum kodume

Un thooram thooram pogumey

seo.description: Full Vidaadha songs lyrics, Ko 2 Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Na. Muthukumar, Music: Leon James, Singer(s): Vishal Dadlani.
seo.keywords: Na. Muthukumar, Ko 2, Leon James, Vishal Dadlani, Vidaadha full lyrics, Ko 2 songs lyrics, Vidaadha lyrics snippets, Vidaadha WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Vidaadha lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vidaadha?

Vidaadha conveys a sense of energy and celebration, encouraging listeners to embrace life and enjoy the moment.

How does this song fit into the plot of Ko 2?

In Ko 2, Vidaadha serves as a lively backdrop that enhances the film's themes of youth and rebellion.

Who is the singer and music director of Vidaadha?

The song is sung by Vishal Dadlani and composed by Leon James.

When was Vidaadha released?

Vidaadha was released on October 3, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vidaadha, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the youthful spirit of the characters in Ko 2. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it perfect for lively occasions. The song encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy life, resonating with themes of freedom and exuberance. Overall, it captures the essence of youthful rebellion and the thrill of living in the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vidaadha from Ko 2 is an electrifying anthem that showcases Vishal Dadlani's powerful vocals paired with Leon James' dynamic composition. This song perfectly captures the spirit of celebration and energy, making it a must-listen for any party playlist. Dive into the vibrant beats and catchy lyrics that will get you moving!
stanzaMeanings: Come, come, come, come, come, come, let's go hunting. No, no, no, no, no, no, don't look back. Thud, thud, thud, thud, thud, thud, thud, thud.
What is the height of the world? There is nothing anywhere. Get up, if you realize it's wrong. If you are strong, then hit back.
If you don't exist, then what's the point? Just listen, don't wander off. You have your hands tied, don't let go. Hit, hit, death is coming.
If you go with anger, your feet will touch the sky. If you go with anger, your speed will increase. If you go with anger, your distance will increase. If you go with anger, your search will succeed.
Don't stop, don't stop, don't stop, just burn it down. Don't stop, don't stop, don't stop, just touch it and burn it down.
Look ahead, don't hide. You too will be hit back. Break the walls, you will explode. All dreams will come true.
Look ahead, don't hide. You too will be hit back. Break the walls, you will explode. Everything you think will happen.
Everywhere there is history, is it not about righteousness? Even the song says that.
If you go with anger, your feet will touch the sky. If you go with anger, your speed will increase. If you go with anger, your distance will increase. If you go with anger, your search will succeed.
Don't stop, don't stop, don't stop, just burn it down. Don't stop, don't stop, don't stop, just touch it and burn it down.

If you don't exist, then what's the point? Just listen, don't wander off. You have your hands tied, don't let go. Hit, hit, death is coming.
If you go with anger, your feet will touch the sky. If you go with anger, your speed will increase. If you go with anger, your distance will increase. If you go with anger, your search will succeed.
Don't stop, don't stop, don't stop, just burn it down. Don't stop, don't stop, don't stop, just touch it and burn it down.
